title: Automate Forms

posts.author: DanaKovatch (dana kovatch)
posts.cookedHtml: I am looking for a way to facilitate notes captured on word document to auto -populate a board. This will be a recurring activity and so I need a way to manage these notes and have a date and a topic associated with these entries every time I take new notes. Is there a way to use a template in Monday or a word document that will auto populate a board in an organized way?
